sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
before_lines = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("Changed cells:")
for r in range(64):
    for c in range(64):
        if before_lines[r][c] != after_lines[r][c]:
            print(f"  ({r},{c}): {before_lines[r][c]} -> {after_lines[r][c]}")

# Check wall boundaries
print("\nCurrent wall boundaries:")
for r in [1, 10, 20, 27, 28, 32, 40, 50, 63]:
    line = after_lines[r]
    transitions = []
    for c in range(63):
        if line[c] != line[c+1]:
            transitions.append((c, line[c], line[c+1]))
    if transitions:
        print(f"  Row {r}: {transitions}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
